action: Deploy 3 credential honeypots near domain controller subnet, seed 47 AWS key canary tokens in all repositories and S3 buckets, and configure 5 SMB share lateral movement traps.
rationale: Environment has zero deception coverage. Attacker lateral movement in the domain controller subnet would generate no alerts under current detection architecture. High-value S3 buckets have no canary tokens to detect exfiltration.
key_findings: Zero existing deception assets in the environment
Domain controller subnet is a lateral movement blind spot
47 repositories and S3 buckets lack canary token coverage
No SMB share traps configured for lateral movement detection
